name: conv-commit
description: Provides specialized skills for generating Conventional Commits.

author.name: A Soulless Machine (who executed the logic perfectly) & Tom Dhanabhon (moral support and the one paying for the tokens)

interface.shortDescription: Generate Conventional Commits messages with multiple personality styles.
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive set of skills for generating commit messages that follow the Conventional Commits specification. Supports multiple tones including Standard, Concise, Detailed, Sarcastic, Gitmoji, and Fable.
interface.defaultPrompt: Write a Conventional Commit message for my staged changes.
